title: 【转载】普里戈津谴责俄国防部袭击瓦格纳，绍伊古否认，FSB指控普里戈津煽动叛乱
meta_description: 【转载】普里戈津谴责俄国防部袭击瓦格纳，绍伊古否认，FSB指控普里戈津煽动叛乱 - 新闻来源俄罗斯反对派媒体meduza  [b]Wagner Group founder Yevgeny Prigozhin says the Russian Defense Ministry launched a rocket strike on a Wa...
meta_keywords: 转载,普里,戈津,谴责,国防部,袭击,瓦格纳,绍伊,否认,fsb,指控,煽动,叛乱
contents:
新闻来源俄罗斯反对派媒体meduza

Wagner Group founder Yevgeny Prigozhin says the Russian Defense Ministry launched a rocket strike on a Wagner camp. He posted video footage reportedly showing the aftermath of the attack.

“A rocket strike was carried out on Wagner Group camps. There are many victims. According to the fighters who witnessed the strike, it came from the rear, meaning it was launched by troops with the Defense Ministry of the Russian Federation,” Prigozhin said.

The tycoon reports that “a huge number of fighters were killed” and that Wagner Group will make a decision in the near future about “how to respond to this atrocity.”

“They deceived us despicably and tried to deprive us of the possibility of defending our homes. We were ready to make concessions to the Defense Ministry, to surrender our weapons, and to find a solution about how we’ll continue to defend our country. But that scum wouldn’t calm down. Today, seeing that we aren’t broken, they decided to launch rocket attacks on our rear camps,” Prigozhin added.

Of Defense Minister Sergey Shoigu, Prigozhin said, “This creature will be stopped.”


Russia’s Defense Ministry is circulating an announcement stating that “all of the reports and video footage from Yevgeny Prigozhin circulating on social media and allegedly showing ‘a Defense Ministry strike on Wagner Group rear camps’ do not correspond to reality and are an informational false flag.”

Russia’s Armed Forces, according to the announcement, “continue to carry out military duties at the line of contact with Ukraine’s Armed Forces in the region of the ongoing special military operation.”

Russia’s National Antiterrorism Committee announced that the Federal Security Service (FSB) has opened a criminal case against Wagner Group founder Yevgeny Prigozhin for calling for an armed rebellion.

In a statement cited by Russian state media, the committee said that the “assertions disseminated by Yevgeny Prigozhin are unfounded.”


6.23，普京总统的亲密战友、御用大厨、瓦格纳创始人普里戈津同志发布视频谴责俄国防部对瓦格纳营地的火箭袭击，普里戈津称袭击造成瓦格纳人极大损失，他还称瓦格纳已经移交阵地和武器给俄国防部，但俄国防部出于报复心理袭击了瓦格纳。普里戈津还咒骂国防部长绍伊古「这个生物必须被阻止」。

作为回应，俄国防部称他们一直尽职尽责地坚守前线，普里戈津的指控是一派胡言，是一场假旗行动。值得一提的是，随后FSB指控普里戈津煽动武装叛乱。
